articles.title: 1 dead, 2 hospitalized in fatal Brockton house fire, officials say
articles.description:
Firefighters tried to rescue an occupant, believed to be a woman in her 40s, but she was dead by the time they found her.

The post 1 dead, 2 hospitalized in fatal Brockton house fire, officials say appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: One woman in her 40s died in a Brockton house fire on April 5.
Two other individuals were hospitalized due to injuries from the fire.
The incident raises concerns about fire safety in residential areas for Boston residents.

articles.title: NH suspect who allegedly shot at family members killed in officer-involved shooting
articles.description:
When local police attempted to take the suspect into custody Saturday afternoon, he allegedly shot and wounded an officer.

The post NH suspect who allegedly shot at family members killed in officer-involved shooting appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Police attempted to arrest a suspect in NH on April 5, 2026.
The suspect shot and wounded an officer during the encounter.
The incident raises concerns about safety for nearby Boston residents.

articles.title: Southern California wildfire mostly contained as officials lift many evacuation orders
articles.description:
Fire officials also lifted evacuation orders for a large swath of neighborhoods Saturday morning.

The post Southern California wildfire mostly contained as officials lift many evacuation orders appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Fire officials in Southern California lifted evacuation orders for affected neighborhoods on Saturday.
The wildfire is now mostly contained, reducing threats to local communities.
Boston residents may see increased air quality as wildfire smoke dissipates.
